payload.claim_text: Non-reimbursable overtime was driven primarily by absentee coverage needs and vacancies.
payload.subject: NYCT Non-Reimbursable Overtime

payload.claim_text: The largest number of vacancies was in Subways/Bus Maintenance (1,721 positions) and Subways/Buses Operations (487 positions). There were significant vacancies in Construction and Development (486 positions), and other administrative functions (207 positions).
payload.subject: NYCT Staffing

payload.claim_text: The largest number of vacancies were in maintenance (23 positions). 64.0% of the vacancies were in the operational hourlies category.
payload.subject: Staten Island Railway Staffing

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Co Largest Vacancy Areas

payload.claim_text: The largest number of vacancies were in maintenance (86 positions). 74% percent of the vacancies are in the managers/supervisors category.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company Staffing

payload.claim_text: Overall increase of $59.2M or 13.0 percent compared to YTD Sep 2019. Overall decrease of -$22.0M or -4.2 percent compared to YTD Sep 2023. $193.4M or 60.2 percent above YTD Sep 2024 forecast budget.
payload.subject: NYCT Non-Reimbursable Overtime

payload.claim_text: Financial results exclude $2.3 billion of Federal formula grant funding which was recorded as operating revenue that will be applied to PAYGO capital.
payload.subject: NYCT Financial Reporting

payload.claim_text: Subways $117.8M overrun: $120.8M due to vacancy and absence coverage; $4.2M for maintenance requirements; $2.7M due to severe weather response; offset by -$7.9M in COVID-19 response; -$2.0M in service requirement.
payload.subject: NYCT Subways Overtime

payload.claim_text: Buses $82.4M overrun: $78.4M due to vacancy and absence coverage; $3.3M for service operations requirement; $0.3M for severe weather response; $0.4M for maintenance requirements.
payload.subject: NYCT Buses Overtime

payload.claim_text: Overall increase of $524.0K or 23.5 percent compared to YTD Sep 2019. Overall increase of $1,928.4K or over 100 percent compared to YTD Sep 2023. -$123.8K or -4.3 percent under YTD Sep 2024 Forecast budget.
payload.subject: Staten Island Railway Non-Reimbursable Overtime

payload.claim_text: Overall increase of $11.6M or 20.4 percent compared to YTD Sep 2019. Overall increase of $2.4M or 3.7 percent compared to YTD Sep 2023. -$5.3M or -7.1 percent favorable YTD Sep 2024 Forecast budget.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company Non-Reimbursable Overtime
